A_basic_context_identifiers.branch_location: Brooklyn Center, Minnesota at 6201 Brooklyn Boulevard
A_basic_context_identifiers.conversation_summary: Jackie Collins from HERTZ called Mary to confirm details for a rental vehicle authorized by State Farm due to front bumper damage on Mary's 2018 Toyota RAV4. The rental is to be picked up from the HERTZ branch in Brooklyn Center. Mary confirmed personal details and the repair shop location, and requested to initially pick up the vehicle between 3:30 to 4:00 p.m. on November 4th. The agent instructed Mary to call the branch an hour in advance to ensure the vehicle is ready. Mary later requested to change the pickup time to 11:00 a.m., which the agent accommodated. Mary was advised to call the branch before 11:00 a.m. to confirm.

decision_points: initial confirmation for 3:30 to 4:00 p.m. rental pickup

C_time_feasibility.customer_stated_timing_need: Initially requested for November 4th between 3:30 and 4:00 p.m., then changed to 11:00 a.m. the same day.

customer_post_call_actions: Present a valid driver's license and a debit/credit card upon vehicle pickup.
K_outcome_customer_effort.effort_burden_explanation: The customer only needed to adjust the pickup time and make a confirmation call, with clear instructions provided.
